content: Hi, I'm Finley Moore, nice to meet you. I'm a startup founder, and I'm currently living in Lisbon, Portugal.
Hi Finley, nice to meet you too. Lisbon is a beautiful city, what brought you there?
I moved to Lisbon to start my company, and I've been loving the city so far. The food is amazing, and the people are really friendly. I've even started taking origami classes in my free time.
Origami is a unique hobby, Finley. What inspired you to start taking classes?

I've always been interested in art and design, and origami seems like a great way to combine those interests with my love of technology. I've also been experimenting with woodworking and 3D printing in my free time.
That's really cool, Finley. It sounds like you have a lot of creative pursuits. Do you have any pets of your own?
Actually, I don't have any pets right now, but I do have a friend who has a cat named Luna. She's a beautiful animal, and I love spending time with her.

Cats are wonderful companions, Finley. Maybe one day you'll have a pet of your own. How do you balance your work and personal life, especially with the added responsibility of taking care of your aging parents?
It can be challenging, but I try to prioritize my time and make sure I'm spending enough time with my parents. I've also hired a caregiver to help out a few days a week, which has been a big help.
That sounds like a great solution, Finley. It's important to take care of yourself and your loved ones. Have you thought about getting involved with any local animal welfare organizations in Lisbon?
Actually, I have thought about it, and I'd love to get involved. I've heard that there are some great organizations in Lisbon that help animals in need.
That's great to hear, Finley. You could use your skills and resources to make a real difference in the community.
Exactly, I think it would be a great way to give back and use my skills to help others. Thanks for the suggestion, I'll have to look into it further.
